titleStmt.title: SII 11.155: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 155. (B.K. No. 181 of 1926-27.) NARĒGAL, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE SET UP IN FRONT OF THE VILLAGE CHĀVAḌI.

summary.p: This inscription, which is slightly damaged, refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated Śaka 1028, Tāraṇa, Kārttika, amāvāsye, Thursday, solar eclipse. The date is irregular. The cyclic year Tāraṇa corresponded to Śaka 1026 = A.D. 1104-05 and in that year Kārttika amāvāsye did not fall on a Thursday; nor was there a solar eclipse on that day. The epigraph registers the gift of land, house-site and oil-mill by Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Bammarasa for worship and for burning lamps in the temple of Brahmēśvara built by him at Nareyaṅgal. The gift was made into the hands of Vigrēśvara Paṇḍita. The genealogy of the Sinda chiefs of Erambarage is traced down to Permāḍi, the son of Āchugi II and he is stated to have been governing Kīsukāḍu Seventy, Keḷavaḍi (Three Hundred) and other districts. The date cited in the record, however, is inadmissible for the Sinda chief Permāḍi. (Vide, Bomb. Gaz. Vol. I, pt. II, p. 575, f.n. 3 and Ep. Ind. Vol. XX, p. 114.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁnamaḥ śivāyaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁ
bhavē . jayatyānaṁdasaṁdōhajñānaiśvaryyamayassadā Icchāmātrasamutpannasamasta bhuva
naḥ śivaḥ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁ saluttamira . Ā cāḷukyakuḷakke bhaktarenisirddatyaṁtavikrāṁtalīlācāryyarkkadanaikadhuryya ravanīprastutyaśuddha
prasiddhācāra rjjagadēkavīra rasadṛkṣakṣatrasaṁvēdyavidyācāturyya rudagradhairya reseda rsindānvayōrvvībhujaru . tadvaṁśapra
bhavaṁ prabhūtavibhavaṁ nānākaḷākōvidaṁ vidviṣṭāvanipāḷajāḷavijayaprōccaṁḍa dōrddaṁḍa nudyadvīrāgraṇi maṁḍa
ḷēśatiḷakaṁ sindānvayakhyātisaṁpadvistāricaritra nācuginṛpaṁ prakhyātiyaṁ tāḷdidaṁ . Anupamasauryyaṁ
cāḷukyanarēṁdrana muṁde haṭṭigāḷegadoḷ peṁpa napapaṁ parapidaneṁdene subhaṭa rddoreye
bageva ḍācugi nṛpanoḷ . Ene negarddācugibhōmipa nanujāta rnnākanṛpati siṁganṛpaṁ dāsanṛpaṁ dā
vanṛpaṁ cauṇḍanṛpaṁ cāvanṛpanene guṇōnna taresedar . Avaroḷage rājyalakṣmīnivāsanena negarddanakhiḷaripubhīkara
sauṣṭhavabhujabaḷaṁ yaśaśrībhavanaṁ kadanapracaṇḍa cāvuṁḍanṛpaṁ . Enisirdā bhūpaniṁdaṁ negaḻda nakhiḷa rājyāṁganā
vallabhaṁ tānene dōrvvikrāṁtadiṁdācuginṛpataneyaṁ baṁmabhūpaṁ raṇābhīḷanṛpāḷōttaṁsa nurvvīdharavibhutaneyādhīśvara śrī
padābjāvanamadbhṛṁgaṁ guṇāṁbhōnidhi budhajanalabdhapraśaṁsāvataṁsaṁ . Ā nṛpatiyiṁde rājyaśrīnārīramaṇa nenisidaṁ
guṇaniḷayaṁ bhūnutaśastrakaḷāvijñānaṁ maṇḍaḷikatiḷaka nācugidēvaṁ . palavuṁ durggaṁgaḷaṁ koṇḍavinatanṛparaṁ tūḷdi beṁ
koṁḍu darppāviḷaraṁ mārkoṁ ḍarātikṣi tipatigaḷa dēśaṁgaḷaṁ kūḍe kaikoṁḍu lasatpuṇya kriyāsaṁbhavavibhavama naṁtocca taṁgoṁ
ḍu lakṣmīlalanākāntaṁ samaṁtācarasa nakhiḷasaukhyāspadakhyātanādaṁ . caṁḍāṁśuprati bhāsi poysaḷana nārddērvvaṭṭidaṁ gōveyaṁ koṁ
ḍaṁ lakṣmana nājiyoḷ tavisidaṁ vikrāṁtadiṁ deyde beṁkoṁḍaṁ pāṁḍyana nāvagaṁ malaparaṁ tūḷdaṭṭidaṁ koṁkaṇaṁgoṁḍaṁ vikra
macakravartti besasal saṁgrāmakaṁṭhīravaṁ . va . Iṁtu dharmmanirmmāṇatatpara nenisida mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ācarasana mahā
sati . paramapatibrate nirmaḷacarite mahāpuṇyasati mahādēvi jagaddaḷamaṇḍaḷēśarājñī śirōvibhūṣaṇa venalke jasa
maṁ taḷedaḷ . Enisida mādēviga vājananutatiḷaka nenisidācarasaṁgaṁ janiyisidaṁ sakala jagajjanaharṣaṁ janiyisalke pe
rmāḍinṛpaṁ . jitavīradviṭvuraṁ nirjjitasamadamahīnāthayūthaṁ bhujōpārjjitanānā maṇḍaḷaṁ tarjjitaripunṛpatībrapratāpōda
yaṁ varjjitakāḷēyaprabhātaprabhavakaluṣanasphūrjjitārāti lōkōrjjitacāritraṁ mahāmaṇḍaḷikatimiracaṁḍāṁśu permmā
ḍidēvaṁ . Anatakṣmāpāḷalakṣmīkumudini mugiyal piṁgalutukriṣṭavidvajjana dāridrāṁdhakāraṁ masuḷa litararājaprabhāvaṁ
svapādāttanṛpāsyāṁbhōruhaṁ bittarisalakhiḷadigmaṁḍaḷavyōmasīmāvaniyaṁ parvvittaṇaṁ siṁdakuḷakamaḷa
mārttaṁḍatībrapratāpaṁ . talegoṁḍaṁ kulaśēkharāṁkana poḍarppiṁ caṭṭanaṁ mutti bāḷdalegoṁḍaṁ jayakēsiyaṁ bedaṟe beṁkoṁ
ḍaṁ pracaṁḍāvanītaḷanāthāgraṇiyappa poysaḷana rājyaśrīya nīḷkoṁḍa naskhaḷitaṁ tānana rūḍhivettaneḷeyoḷ permmāḍi
bhūpāḷakaṁ . samanār permmāḍibhūpaṁgena śucitarita snānadēvārccanāhōma mahādānabrataughadvijagurumunipojādiReadśucicarita.
puṇyakriyāprakramadiṁ dharmmārtthaśāstraśrutiyi nakhiḷadivyānnadānaṁgaḷiṁ duttama nānā navyakāvyaśravaṇasarasagōṣṭhīvi
ḷāsaṁgaḷiṁdaṁ . sale saphaḷavenisi divasaṁ saluttamire sadvinōdadiṁ rājyaśrīlalaneyoḍa gūḍi sukhadiṁ naliyutti
rppaṁ salīla nabhinavabhōjaṁ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā ḷakamaḷa
mārttaṁḍaṁ maṁḍaḷikakusumakōdaṁḍa sūkaḷahayārūḍha kṣaṇaṁ
kavigamakavādivāgmijanasaṁstūyamāna
Āpāraparahitācāryya . Asahāya śā
strādisatukaḷāpravīṇa raṇāṁga durgga
varggatriṇētra Ādirājaca da
śrībrahmēśvaradēvalabdhavara sar kisu
kāḍerppattuṁ keḷavaḍimū maṁ duṣṭa
nigraha viśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ deraṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirdu pu
rātanamappa dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ pratipāḷisu gaḷgella sā sana māgalvērkku meṁdu kāruṇyaṁgeyyal .
ka . jaḷanidhiparivritavasudhātaḷadoḷu bharatōrvvi geseva kuntaḷadēśaṁ tiḷaka menisirddu dada ṟoḷ phaḷabharitaṁ nareyaṁga
lu karaṁ raṁjisuguṁ . va . Antu sogayisuva narayaṁgalleraḍuṁ baḷado ḷagaṇyapuṇya mudi tōditamappa puṇyapuruṣariṁde dha
rmmapratipāḷanāpararappa prabhugāvūṇḍugaḷiṁda mesadu malli teṁkaṇa bhāgadūra naḍuvaṇa śrībrahmē
śvaramaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ bammarasar māḍisi dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ sakavarṣa 1028 neya tāraṇasaṁvatsarada
kārttike damavāsye brihaspativāradaṁdina sūryyagrahaṇadoḷ vigrēśvarapaṇḍitargge dhārā pūrvvakaṁ māḍi pā
ramēśvaradattisarvvānamaśyamāge biṭṭa bhūmiya sthaḷaviṟisilu gōvinākārada mattar hannūṁduma kaṇniya
ra cavuṇḍagāvuṁḍana gavuṁḍavaḷadiṁ mūḍa karabhūmiyiṁ nāmagāvuṁḍana haṭṭagāṟaviṭṭiṁ teṁka karabhūmiyiṁ
sōbhanēśvara mānyadiṁ paḍuva doṁdeyageṟeyiṁ baḍaga nālku gōṁṭigaṁ liṁgamuṁ kavile yuṁ tapōdhanaru verasu māḍi niṟisidaṁ
kiṁnarigalla guḍḍe nālku dēvara nivēṣaṇaṁ śrīcuṁgēśvaradiṁ mūḍa śrīma giyiṁ teṁka yara kāvagāvuṁḍana ga
vuṁḍagēriyiṁ paḍuva muriyagētana haṭṭagāṟavaneyiṁ baḍaga lintīsthaḷadoḷa ṣṭabhōga sāmyamāge dēvara naṁdādī
vigege sarvvanamasyada ghāṇavoṁdu Īntīdharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāśi prayā ge Argghyatīrtha ba
tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ sāsirvvar caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarggaṁ sāsirvvarttapōdha narggaṁ
ṇyamakku . Īdharmmama naḷidavargge vāraṇāśi kurukṣētra
siraliṁgamuṁ sāsirakavileyuma naḷida mahāpāta pālanīyō bhava
dbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ prārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yā varṣa saha
śrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 11.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
